name: Kuttle Soup from Tessin
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and cut the vegetables into fine strips. Cut the beef tripe into similar pieces.
2. Finely chop the onion and garlic, and dice the bacon. Sauté them in olive oil until they are lightly browned.
3. Add the chopped vegetables to the pan with bacon. Include the beef tripe and allow the mixture to simmer gently for a few minutes.
4. Cube the tomatoes (remove seeds) and add them to the pot. Stir well.
5. Pour in the red wine, then the beef broth. Reduce heat to low and let it simmer for about 30 minutes.
6. Add chopped parsley and caraway seeds just before the cooking time ends.
7. Sprinkle grated Parmesan cheese on top before serving.
This recipe is based on a traditional Tessiner kitchen method as described by Peter P. Riesterner in "Tessiner Küche" (1993).
